data.title: Real’s Monthly Agent Survey: Competitive Economics Remain the Top Driver of Brokerage Choice
data.description: In Miami, a recent survey conducted by Real found that competitive economics continue to be the primary factor influencing brokerage choice for agents. The survey, which gathered data from agents on a monthly basis, revealed that a significant majority of respondents prioritize competitive economics when selecting a brokerage to work with. This highlights the importance of financial considerations in the decision-making process, underscoring the need for brokerages to remain competitive in this aspect. The survey's results provide valuable insights for brokers aiming to attract and retain agents in a highly competitive market.

data.title: Texas A&M Engineering Experiment Station Selects Dell Technologies to Build a Secure AI Platform for National Research
data.description: A company located in Round Rock, Texas, the Texas A&M Engineering Experiment Station (TEES), has chosen Dell Technologies (NYSE: DELL) to create the Innovative Growth in Next Generation AI Technology Ecosystem (IGNITE). This new platform, funded by the State of Texas, will be dedicated to AI and high-performance computing (HPC) projects. IGNITE aims to facilitate extensive AI research in various fields such as engineering, national security, and scientific exploration. It will provide shared infrastructure capable of supporting large-scale AI-driven projects.

data.title: 360insights Wins at Incentive Marketing Association North America Awards
data.description: At the recent IMA Summit, 360insights was honored by the Incentive Marketing Association for their outstanding performance in Incentive Travel, receiving multiple awards. Jason Atkins, the Founder and CEO of 360insights, expressed his pride in the recognition, highlighting the successful collaboration with Trulite. He emphasized that the award-winning programs showcase the effectiveness of well-executed incentive strategies, yielding measurable results and memorable experiences for individuals. The acknowledgment reaffirms their commitment to excellence in the industry.

data.title: Starfighters Space Selects CBIZ CPAs P.C. as Independent Registered Public Accounting Firm
data.description: Starfighters Space, Inc. (NYSE American: FJET), based in Kennedy Space Center, Florida, revealed that it has selected CBIZ CPAs P.C. as its independent registered public accounting firm. This decision comes after a comprehensive review process conducted by the Audit Committee and approved by the Board of Directors. Starfighters Space is known for operating the sole commercial fleet of flight-ready Mach 2+ F-104 supersonic aircraft globally. This move aims to strengthen the financial oversight and reporting of the company as it navigates the dynamic space industry.

data.title: Barbie® Celebrates Basketball Superstar Angel Reese with a Barbie Signature Doll and Matching Reebok Angel Reese 1 Basketball Shoes
data.description: Toy company Mattel, Inc. revealed that Barbie will release a doll inspired by basketball icon Angel Reese, emphasizing her impact on sports, entrepreneurship, and philanthropy. The Barbie doll will showcase Reese's style and features in Reebok Angel Reese 1 Basketball Shoes colored in Barbie pink. The doll aims to encourage young girls to aspire fearlessly, with a twin set of the shoes also up for grabs for enthusiasts.

data.title: Alorica India’s New Impact Sourcing Initiative Creates Job Opportunities for Under-represented Communities While Delivering Top Performance
data.description: Alorica, based in Irvine, California, is expanding its operations in India, aiming to provide employment opportunities for marginalized communities through a recent impact sourcing program. This initiative is set to generate a considerable number of jobs, fostering inclusivity and diversity within the workforce.

data.title: ICE First Look at Mortgage Performance: New Default Activity Posts Annual Decline Led by FHA Loans
data.description: Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE: ICE), a prominent provider of financial market technology and data, recently issued the June 2026 ICE First Look report on mortgage delinquency, foreclosure, and prepayment trends. The analysis revealed that early-stage delinquencies stayed minimal with a decrease in new default activity. Notably, there was a significant annual drop in new FHA defaults, marking the largest decline in over four years. The report highlights positive trends in the mortgage market with improving overall performance.

data.title: InMobi Advertising Launches FRAME Attention, Delivering 3.5x More Attentive Seconds Than YouTube Equivalent Video Ads
data.description: In New York today, InMobi Advertising introduced FRAME Attention, a newly certified high-attention media offering for Mobile In-App Video and Connected TV.

data.title: ISG to Study Contact Center, Customer Experience Services
data.description: A research firm based in Stamford, Connecticut, ISG, has initiated a study on service providers aiding enterprises in upgrading contact centers and enhancing customer experience by incorporating Artificial Intelligence (AI) and improving service delivery.

data.title: Fastly Joins Experian Agent Trust™ Ecosystem to Advance Trusted AI Commerce
data.description: In Costa Mesa, California, Experian revealed that Fastly (FSLY), a prominent global edge cloud platform, has recently become a part of the expanding Experian Agent Trust™ network. This collaboration aims to assist businesses in verifying AI agents, approving transactions, and facilitating trust-related judgments promptly, particularly as autonomous commerce gains traction. Kathleen Peters, Chief Innovati, expressed that agentic commerce signifies a substantial transformation in digital trade akin to the emergence of mobile technology.

data.title: Americas Cardroom's Alex Foxen Featured Throughout ESPN's WSOP Main Event Premiere
data.description: Professional poker player Alex Foxen, representing Americas Cardroom, has been prominently showcased in ESPN's initial two broadcasts of the 2026 World Poker Championship. His appearance alongside fellow player Chris Moneymaker solidifies the online poker brand's exposure across different ESPN coverage eras. This announcement was made from San Jose, Costa Rica, on July 24, 2026, through a news release issued by PRNewswire.
Verizon CEO: AI infrastructure revenue will begins to layer into our results starting in 2027.

data.title: Thailand SEC accuses Bitkub & ex-directors of false disclosures tied to 2021 cyberattack with $50M assets involved.
data.description: Thailand’s Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has taken legal action against Bitkub and two former directors for suspected misleading disclosures connected to a cyberattack in 2021. The attack reportedly resulted in the loss of around $50 million in assets.
BLACKROCK KICKS OFF US HIGH-GRADE BOND SALE TIED TO META

data.title: NYSE Content Update: State Street + NYSE to Celebrate 'Fearless Girl'
data.description: A pre-market daily advisory is issued by the NYSE directly from its trading floor. Today, on July 24, 2026, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) released its pre-market update. Investors can access this update for valuable market insights before the trading day begins.

data.title: Brave Healer Productions Releases Vol. 3 of The Caregiver's Advocate: A Complete Guide to Support and Resources
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland on July 24, 2026, Brave Healer Productions made an announcement about the launch of The Caregiver's Advocate: A Comprehensive Guide to Support and Resources, Volume 3. This new release is accessible in Kindle and paperback formats, continuing the series that has garnered international attention.

data.title: Sidus Space Appoints Alan Khalili as Chief Financial Officer to Drive Next Phase of Growth
data.description: In Cape Canaveral, Florida on July 24, 2026, Sidus Space, Inc. (NASDAQ: SIDU) revealed the hiring of Alan Khalili as their new Chief Financial Officer, starting on July 27, 2026. Sidus is known for its advancements in space and defense technology. Khalili's appointment marks a significant move for the company, augmenting its executive team with his financial expertise.

data.title: Roche receives FDA clearance for the cobas® BV/CV assay, enabling fast and highly accurate vaginitis diagnosis
data.description: A novel PCR test has been developed to detect Bacterial vaginosis (BV) and Candida vaginitis (CV) using clinician-collected or clinician-instructed self-collected vaginal swab specimens. This innovative molecular assay aims to enhance diagnostic precision for symptomatic women.

data.title: Ridgetech Strengthens Pharmaceutical Ecosystem Leadership with Vice-President Role in Zhejiang Biomedical Association
data.description: On July 24, 2026, Ridgetech, Inc. (Nasdaq: RDGT), a Chinese wholesale distributor of pharmaceutical and healthcare products, revealed the launch of its offline pharmaceutical wholesale distribution platform. The platform is owned entirely by Ridgetech and marks a significant move in its operations.

data.title: ref-ology tapped by the UPSHOT League to lead UPSHOT Referee Operations
data.description: In Jacksonville, Florida on July 24, 2026, the UPSHOT League has partnered with ref-ology, a community established by referees for referees, aiming to support their development and leadership both on and off the court. Ref-ology is known for providing officiating training and resources, emphasizing growth and service within the community.
